heading: Taxation by State, county, etc., taxing authority; Federal tax status
label: 3019 Taxation by State, county, etc., taxing authority; Federal tax status
notes: References in TextSubchapter T of chapter 1 of title 26, referred to in subsec. (b), is set out as section 1381 et seq. of Title 26, Internal Revenue Code.

Amendments1986—Subsec. (b). substituted “Internal Revenue Code of 1986” for “Internal Revenue Code of 1954”, which for purposes of codification was translated as “title 26” thus requiring no change in text.Pub. children.label: a
children.text: The Bank, including its franchise, capital, reserves, surplus, mortgages, or other security holdings and income shall be exempt from taxation now or hereafter imposed by any State, county, municipality, or local taxing authority, but any real property held by the Bank shall be subject to any State, county, municipal, or local taxation to the same extent according to its value as other real property is taxed.
the Bank shall be treated as a corporation operating on the cooperative basis within the meaning of ;section 1381(a)(2) of title 26

the term “patronage dividend”, as defined in includes, only as such section applies to the Bank, any patronage refunds in the form of class B or class C stock or allocated surplus that are distributed or set aside by the Bank pursuant to ;section 1388(a) of title 26section 3014(i) of this title

the terms “written notice of allocation” and “qualified written notices of allocation”, as defined in sections 1388(b) and (c) of title 26, include (to the extent of par value), only as such sections apply to the Bank, any class B or class C stock distributed by the Bank pursuant to and shall also include any allocated surplus set aside by the Bank pursuant to ;section 3014(i) of this titlesection 3014(i) of this title

patrons of the Bank shall be deemed to have consented under to the inclusion in their incomes of any qualified written notices of allocation received by such patrons from the Bank; andsection 1388(c)(2) of title 26

any amounts required to be included in the incomes of patrons of the Bank with respect to class B or class C stock or allocated surplus shall be treated as earnings from business done by such patrons of the Bank with or for their own patrons.
